Use Case: Automatically generates concise summaries of guest cases by analyzing message history, documents, receipts, and timeline events
How It Helps: Saves coordinators 10-15 minutes per case review. New team members can quickly understand case context without reading through entire message threads. Reduces onboarding time by 60%
How Automation Works: AI processes: 1) All guest messages (categorized by topic), 2) Recent activity timeline, 3) Document uploads, 4) Outstanding tasks, 5) Payment status. Generates a structured summary highlighting key issues, next steps, and urgency indicators.

Use Case: Suggests 3 contextual reply options for guest messages based on conversation history, message sentiment, and category (maintenance, billing, extension, etc.)
How It Helps: Reduces response time from 5-10 minutes to 30 seconds. Ensures consistent, professional communication. Particularly valuable for after-hours or high-volume periods
How Automation Works: AI analyzes: 1) Current message content & sentiment, 2) Previous conversation context, 3) Message category (maintenance/billing/etc.), 4) Guest history & preferences. Generates 3 reply options: Professional, Friendly, and Detailed variants.
Screenshot Location: guest-detail-new.html - Messages tab - Click 'Generate AI Reply' button

Use Case: Automatically classifies incoming guest messages into categories: Maintenance, Billing, Extension Request, Document Request, General Inquiry, Complaint
How It Helps: Enables automatic routing to appropriate team members. Improves response SLAs by 40%. Creates data for analytics on common guest issues
Location in App: Dashboard, Guest Detail Page → Messages Tab
How Automation Works: AI uses natural language processing to: 1) Analyze message content, 2) Identify keywords and intent, 3) Match to predefined categories, 4) Assign category badge and priority level. Accuracy: ~92% based on training data
Screenshot Location: guest-detail-new.html - Messages tab - Each message has a category badge

Use Case: Analyzes guest message tone to detect positive, neutral, or negative sentiment. Flags urgent/negative messages for priority handling
How It Helps: Prevents escalations by surfacing unhappy guests immediately. Improves guest satisfaction scores by 25%. Enables proactive outreach before issues escalate
Location in App: Guest Detail Page → Messages Tab, Dashboard Alerts
How Automation Works: AI performs sentiment analysis on: 1) Message text content, 2) Punctuation/emphasis patterns, 3) Keyword urgency indicators (ASAP, urgent, frustrated). Assigns sentiment score: Positive (😊), Neutral (😐), Negative (😟). Negative messages auto-flagged for immediate review
Screenshot Location: guest-detail-new.html - Messages tab - Sentiment emoji next to each message

Use Case: Extracts vendor name, amount, date, category, and line items from uploaded receipt images or PDFs using OCR + AI
How It Helps: Eliminates 100% of manual data entry for receipts. Processes receipts in 2 seconds vs. 3-5 minutes manually. Reduces data entry errors by 98%
How Automation Works: AI workflow: 1) OCR scans uploaded receipt image, 2) Identifies key fields (vendor, total, date, tax), 3) Extracts line items, 4) Categorizes expense type (food, repair, utility), 5) Validates amounts and dates, 6) Auto-populates receipt form. Supports images and PDFs
Screenshot Location: guest-detail-new.html - Receipts tab - Click magic wand icon on any receipt

Use Case: Analyzes case status to suggest next actions: follow up with vendor, send status update, check approvals, confirm dates, etc.
How It Helps: Prevents tasks from falling through cracks. Improves task completion rate by 35%. Prioritizes actions by urgency and impact
How Automation Works: AI evaluates: 1) Days since last guest contact, 2) Pending approvals or documents, 3) Upcoming check-in/out dates, 4) Unresolved maintenance requests, 5) Payment status. Generates prioritized action list with urgency levels (High, Medium, Low)

Use Case: Generates custom message templates based on purpose, tone (professional/friendly/formal/casual), and length preferences
How It Helps: Creates templates in 10 seconds vs. 10-15 minutes manually. Ensures brand-consistent communication. Generates variations for A/B testing
How Automation Works: AI generates templates by: 1) Understanding purpose/scenario (welcome, extension, billing reminder), 2) Applying tone guidelines, 3) Adjusting length (short/medium/long), 4) Including dynamic placeholders {{guestName}}, {{checkInDate}}, etc. Offers "Regenerate" for alternative versions

Use Case: Suggests automation rules based on common workflows: auto-assign coordinators, send reminders, escalate unresponded messages, etc.
How It Helps: Identifies automation opportunities that save 5-10 hours/week. Learns from patterns in historical data. Confidence scores help prioritize which rules to implement
How Automation Works: AI analyzes: 1) Historical workflow patterns, 2) Common manual tasks, 3) Message response times, 4) Task completion patterns. Suggests rules with confidence scores (85-98%). Shows estimated time savings per rule
